prompt: A high-angle wide-shot aerial photograph of a cracked white salt-flat desert. In the exact center, a small circular island of extreme luxury: a single ornate mahogany dining table draped in heavy crimson silk, surrounded by exactly 6 high-backed gold chairs. Stretching from this tiny circle to the razor-sharp horizon in every direction is a dense, suffocating, infinite sea of billions of small, dented, rusted tin bowls. The bowls are packed so tightly they create a geometric metallic texture across the earth. Harsh, high-contrast sunlight, deep shadows, cinematic editorial photography, surrealist data visualization, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic textures. --ar 16:9 --v 6.1 --stylize 250
dataset_name: Oxfam International: Public Good or Private Wealth?
insight: The 26 wealthiest individuals on Earth possess the same amount of wealth as the bottom 50% of the entire global population (3.9 billion people), visualized as a tiny island of luxury surrounded by an ocean of poverty.
